name: Bromley Athletics Track
metaTitle: Norman Park Athletics Track | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for Norman Park Athletics Track in Bromley.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Managed by Norman Park Track Management Ltd. Availability depends on club sessions and event bookings; contact for daily hours.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Pay-as-you-go sessions available for individuals. Contact the track management at 020 8462 5134 for current rates.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A fully floodlit 8-lane 400m synthetic track with a full range of jumping and throwing facilities.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free car parking is available on-site within the Norman Park sports ground.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Check the official Bromley council website or contact track management for facility updates.
